actionUnits.condition: Enter Elevator trigger volume to invoke OnTriggerEnter on AttachToElevator. Scene MonoBehaviour (id=1067963293) with m_Script guid=077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77 matches the provided script AttachToElevator, serialized field player=fileID 7425022. Elevator has BoxCollider id=1067963289 with m_IsTrigger=1 and no Rigidbody; therefore, a different collider with a Rigidbody must move into this trigger. Note: The script checks if (gameObject == player); code inside will execute only if player reference equals this Elevator GameObject (prefab instance fileID=15099978). Otherwise only the Unity callback is hit and no SetParent occurs.

Exit Elevator trigger volume to invoke OnTriggerExit on AttachToElevator. Same MonoBehaviour (id=1067963293, guid=077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Requires the same Rigidbody-equipped collider to leave the BoxCollider (id=1067963289). The if (gameObject == player) condition must be true to execute player.transform.parent = null; otherwise only the Unity callback occurs.
